criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI-powered functionalities within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction and ease of use.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: Number of downloads and active users.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different operating systems (e.g., iOS, Android).

criteria.name: Pricing
criteria.description: Cost of the app and availability of in-app purchases.
